channel.title: RL on Yellowtown's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in RL on Yellowtown's Blog

item.title: LoRA without Regret
item.description: Thinking Machines’ latest blog finally demystifies LoRA

item.title: RL's Razor
item.description: Verified through solid evidence that RL forgets less than SFT because on-policy training inherently has an implicit low KL constraint, making the KL divergence between the model’s output distribution after RL and before RL smaller.
